subcodes.first_line: We were walking in the prison of Akka, detached from what hath been created in the world of being and speaking forth in praise of the King of Names
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا کنا ماشیاً فی سجن عکا منقطعاً عما خلق فی الانشآء و ناطقاً بذکر مالک الأسمآء
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to divines; to religious leaders, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @rejection of Muhammad, @suffering and imprisonment, @power of the Manifestation of God, @Manifestation of God does not act of own volition, @call to action, @lack of formal education of the Manifestation of God, @the power of words; of speech
